settings.description: API keys required by nodes in this library

metadata.author: Griptape, Inc
metadata.description: Default nodes for Griptape Nodes

widgets.name: KlingMultiShotEditor
widgets.description: Multi-shot editor for Kling v3 customize mode.

widgets.name: MaskAdjustmentPreview
widgets.description: Interactive preview for mask adjustment with timeline scrubbing and dilation/erosion controls.

widgets.name: SplatViewer
widgets.description: Inline Gaussian splat viewer — auto-renders the highest-fidelity wired splat using OrbitControls, matching the vsl-gui SplatComponent appearance.

widgets.name: CropImageEditor
widgets.description: Interactive crop editor — drag to move/resize the crop rectangle, draw a new crop area, with rule-of-thirds guides and live coordinate readout.

widgets.name: CropVideoEditor
widgets.description: Interactive video crop editor — drag handles on a live video frame with frame scrubber, aspect ratio, resolution, and position presets.

widgets.name: SelectFromGrid
widgets.description: Interactive grid selector — displays list items as thumbnails (images, video, audio, text) and lets the user click to select one or more.

Splat.title: Splat
Splat.description: Gaussian splatting and 3D world generation nodes

video/seedance.title: Seedance
video/seedance.description: Seedance reference assets and supporting nodes

image/image_models.title: Image Models
image/image_models.description: Image Generation Models for Griptape Agents

utils.title: Utility
utils.description: Utility nodes like save, etc., etc

lists.title: Lists
lists.description: Nodes to interact with and work with Lists

sequence.title: Sequence
sequence.description: Nodes for parsing and inspecting numbered file sequences

variables.title: Variables
variables.description: Flow variable management nodes with hierarchical scoping

filesystem.title: Filesystem
filesystem.description: Nodes for configuring and managing file paths

Askulator was once a humble desk calculator in a university math lab. One day, lightning struck the building during a particularly spicy differential equations final. Now imbued with the power of language... and attitude... it nodes among us. Solving math, interpreting riddles, and offering just a hint of sarcasm.
